Examples Gallery

Contents

  • Case studies

Examples Gallery#

The examples below use opyrability’s functions/capabilities extensively for different tasks, such as:

  • Obtaining operability sets

  • Inverse mapping of operability sets

  • Evaluation of the Operability Index (OI)

  • Ranking of competing design/control structures using the OI as a metric

All functions are used simultaneously to achieve design and control assessment tasks in representative case studies.

Additionally, Opyrability enables users to integrate their own models from various commercial and open-source platforms, as well as machine learning surrogate models (ML surrogates). The following examples demonstrate operability studies conducted with external software and ML frameworks:

Case studies#

Operability analysis of the Shower Problem

Operability analysis of a Direct Methane Aromatization Membrane Reactor (DMA-MR)

Direct Air Capture example using AVEVA Process Simulation

Sewage Sludge Gassification example using Aspen Plus

Air Separation Plant example using Unisim

Solid Oxide Electrolyzer Cell example using IDAES

Operability Analysis of an Air Cooling System using DWSIM and Opyrability

Operability analysis of the Shower Problem using Gaussian processes (GPs)

Operability analysis of the DMA-MR process using Gaussian processes (GPs)

Surrogate-Based Operability Analysis of a Heat Exchanger using the DWSIM process simulator and a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP)

Dynamic operability analysis of a Direct Methane Aromatization Membrane Reactor (DMA-MR)

Dynamic operability analysis of the HYPER cyber-physical fuel cell and gas turbine hybrid system

Comparing dynamic operability mapping methods (linear, nonlinear projection, n-step) on the DMA-MR

Operability-based process intensification of the DMA-MR: P1, P2, P3 and the multilayer MILP

Equation-oriented operability: Pyomo models in opyrability

Inverse mapping with the Pounce solver

Ranking process designs by the Operability Index
